form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 300m. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 1 over 350m at this track behind Special Rocky beaten 8 lengths (19.41). Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time at Grafton but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching three minors in a row. Has a solid record off the draw but will need a little luck to feature.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 300m. Last start finished 4th over 300m at this track beaten 1.3 lengths (16.64) behind Enter Warp Speed in a Grade 5 on April 6. Brought a two-start winning streak to an end last time when he missing the frame. Worth another try.
